title: 1.2: Tests that chunked image loading assembles multiple payload chunks into complete image data
1.3: Tests that zlib-compressed image data is correctly decompressed when loaded with compression flag
1.4: Tests that file-based image loading reads file contents correctly with t='f' transmission type
1.5: Tests that shared memory loading reads data from POSIX SHM with t='s' transmission type
1.6: Tests that PNG images load correctly with f=100 format code for different color modes
1.7: Tests that loading invalid PNG data returns error response
1.8: Tests that loading with client number (I parameter) tracks images by number across multiple loads
1.9: Tests that delete operation by client number (I parameter) removes the correct image
2.1: Places the test for image transmission methods in kitty_tests/graphics.py
2.2: Places the test for PNG color format loading in kitty_tests/graphics.py
2.3: Places the test for simple PNG validation in kitty_tests/graphics.py
2.4: Places the test for client number operations in kitty_tests/graphics.py
3.1: All tests follow the test_ prefix naming pattern
3.2: All tests use self.ae() or self.assertEqual() for equality assertions
4.1: Uses m=1 flag for intermediate chunks and m=0 for final chunk in chunked transmission
4.2: PNG test uses @unittest.skipIf decorator to skip when PIL is unavailable
4.3: Uses f=100 format code for PNG image loading
